description_long: This is a standard-sized black aluminum can with a metallic top and a pull tab opening. The can features a bold, pixel-art inspired graphic design with yellow, red, and white elements, including a lightning bolt, stylized text, and geometric shapes. The main label displays the text 'LFOP1 ENERGY DRINK' in a pixelated font, accompanied by the word 'SIP!' and a barcode on the side. The surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light, and there are no visible signs of condensation. The can is cylindrical, with a slightly concave bottom and a seamless, continuous exterior. The overall appearance is modern and eye-catching, suitable for urban environments.
description: A black aluminum can with pixel-art graphics, metallic top, and bold, colorful label elements. The surface is smooth and glossy, with a modern, urban design.
description_view_0: The can's side is visible, showing the barcode, part of the label text, and some pixel-art graphics.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front label with the lightning bolt, 'LFOP1 ENERGY DRINK', and 'SIP!' text, along with geometric shapes.
description_view_2: The can's front is fully visible, displaying the main pixel-art graphics and text in clear detail.
description_view_3: The can is rotated to show the label text, barcode, and a partial view of the main graphics.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features pixel-art style graphics with a lightning bolt, geometric shapes, and bold, blocky typography in yellow, red, and white on a black background. The design is modern and visually striking, with a digital, retro-gaming aesthetic.
